---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve AssistStudio
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.
Debug logs can be enabled via Settings → Advanced → Debug Mode.

**Environment**
- App version: (e.g., 0.14.0)
- OS: (e.g., Windows 11 24H2, Windows 10 22H2)
- .NET Runtime: (e.g., .NET 9.0)

**Area** (check all that apply)
- [ ] Chat / Streaming
- [ ] Provider (Claude / OpenAI / Gemini / Ollama / Groq)
- [ ] Tool calling / Tool approval
- [ ] Sub-Agent / Specialist
- [ ] MCP server (Essentials / Filesystem / Rag / Outbox / External)
- [ ] Knowledge Base / RAG
- [ ] Conversation branching / .astd file
- [ ] Attachments / Media rendering
- [ ] Profiles / Presets
- [ ] Schedule / Runner
- [ ] Settings / UI
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
